messages.content: act as a candidate thanks the hiring manager for sending you CV to the HR department

Subject: Gratitude for Forwarding my CV to HR Department

Dear [Hiring Manager's Name],

I hope this email finds you well. I am writing to extend my deepest appreciation for your prompt action in forwarding my Curriculum Vitae (CV) to the HR Department as part of the ongoing recruitment process for the [Job Position].

I am truly grateful that you have taken the time to carefully review my application and found it worthy of consideration. Your support and endorsement demonstrate your confidence in my suitability for the role, and I am genuinely honored and thankful for this opportunity.

I understand that the HR Department will be responsible for further evaluating my qualifications and assessing my competency for the position. I am enthusiastic to participate in any additional procedures they may require, such as interviews, tests, or references.

I am eagerly looking forward to the chance to present my skills, experiences, and passion for the [Company Name] with the HR team. Should they require any further documentation or information, please do not hesitate to let me know. I am more than willing to provide whatever is necessary to support my application.

Once again, I am immensely grateful for your continuous support throughout this process. I truly admire the work being carried out at [Company Name] and would be honored to contribute to its success.

Thank you for giving my application the attention it merits.

Yours sincerely,

[Your Name]
make it shorter and casual

Subject: Thank you for forwarding my CV!

Hey [Hiring Manager's Name],

Just wanted to drop a quick note to say thanks for forwarding my CV to the HR Department. I really appreciate your help in getting my application one step closer in the hiring process for the [Job Position] at [Company Name].

It means a lot to me that you believe in my potential for this role. I'm excited to continue the process with the HR Department and look forward to any additional steps they may have in store, like interviews or tests.

If there's anything else they need from me, please don't hesitate to let me know. I'm more than happy to provide any additional information or documents they may require.

Thanks again for your support and for considering me for this opportunity. I'm really looking forward to the chance to join the [Company Name] team.

Best regards,

[Your Name]
shorter

Subject: Thanks for forwarding my CV!

Hey [Hiring Manager's Name],

Just wanted to quickly thank you for forwarding my CV to the HR Department. I really appreciate it!

Looking forward to moving forward in the hiring process with the HR team.

Thanks again!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
add send my regards to <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON> ;)

Subject: Thanks for forwarding my CV!

Hey [Hiring Manager's Name],

Just wanted to quickly thank you for forwarding my CV to the HR Department. I really appreciate it!

Please send my regards to <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON> as well ;)

Looking forward to moving forward in the hiring process with the HR team.

Thanks again!

Best regards,
[Your Name]
add thanks for answering in spanish, I will reply to you in english if you don't mind ^^

Subject: Thanks for forwarding my CV!

¡Hola [Hiring Manager's Name]!

Justo quería agradecerte rápidamente por enviar mi CV al Departamento de Recursos Humanos. ¡Realmente lo aprecio!

Also, gracias por responder en español. No hay problema en que te responda en inglés si no te molesta ;)

I'm really excited to move forward in the hiring process with the HR team and showcase my skills and qualifications. I'll make sure to reply promptly to any further communication from them.

Thanks again for your support!

Best regards,
[Your Name]

act as a candidate, in a form of an email for the Hiring manager Adrien BOISNAULT and offer you to receive your cv after talking on LinkedIn, thanks him , the posiition is  Spanish Digital Marketing Consultant – Google Ads Products position in Barcelona.

Subject: Interest in the Spanish Digital Marketing Consultant position at Barcelona

Dear <PRESIDIO_ANONYMIZED_PERSON>,

I hope this email finds you well. I recently came across your LinkedIn profile and was extremely impressed by your professional experience and the positive impact you have made in the field of digital marketing. 

I wanted to reach out to express my interest in the Spanish Digital Marketing Consultant position at Barcelona. After going through the job description and requirements, I believe my skills and background align well with the role and I am confident in my ability to contribute to the success of your team.

I have a strong background in digital marketing strategies, with a particular focus on Google Ads Products. With extensive experience in developing and implementing successful marketing campaigns, my expertise lies in leveraging the power of online advertising to drive customer engagement and boost conversions.

I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to discuss this position further and provide you with more details about my qualifications. If it is convenient for you, I would be more than happy to schedule a call at your earliest convenience. Alternatively, I can share my CV with you via LinkedIn or any other preferred method.

Thank you for considering my application for the Spanish Digital Marketing Consultant position. I am eager to learn more about the role and how I can contribute to your team's success. I look forward to hearing from you.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]

optimize this email and make it more casual : Hi Adrien,

I hope this email finds you well. thnak you for sharing my CV to the HR department for the role Spanish Digital Marketing Consultant position at Barcelona. After going through the job description and requirements, I believe my skills and background align well with the role and I am confident in my ability to contribute to the success of your team.

I have a strong background in digital marketing strategies, with a particular focus on Google Ads Products. With extensive experience in developing and implementing successful marketing campaigns, my expertise lies in leveraging the power of online advertising to drive customer engagement and boost conversions.

I would greatly appreciate the opportunity to discuss this position further and provide you with more details about my qualifications. If it is convenient for you, I would be more than happy to schedule a call at your earliest convenience. Alternatively, I can share my CV with you via LinkedIn or any other preferred method.

Thank you for considering my application for the Spanish Digital Marketing Consultant position. I am eager to learn more about the role and how I can contribute to your team’s success. I look forward to hearing from you.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]

Subject: Interested in the Spanish Digital Marketing Consultant position in Barcelona

Hi Adrien,

I hope this email finds you well. Just wanted to say a big thank you for sharing my CV with the HR department for the Spanish Digital Marketing Consultant position in Barcelona. I really appreciate your support!

After reviewing the job description and requirements, I'm confident that my skills and background are a great fit for the role. With a strong background in digital marketing strategies, especially in leveraging Google Ads Products, I have a proven track record of successfully implementing marketing campaigns to drive customer engagement and boost conversions.

I would love the opportunity to discuss the position in more detail and share additional information about my qualifications. If it works for you, we could schedule a call at your earliest convenience. Alternatively, I'm happy to share my CV with you through LinkedIn or any other preferred method.

Thank you for considering my application for the Spanish Digital Marketing Consultant position. I'm genuinely excited to learn more about the role and how I can contribute to the success of your team. Looking forward to hearing from you.

Warm regards,

[Your Name]

act a a candidate, reply to this email, include that I understand, I will the question of the hybrif mode in mind for the next step but I am happy to move forward in the process : Dear Cristina, 

I would be more than happy to adjust your hybrid model schedule, however as a recruiter I do not have such power. This is a decision made by the client and our management, and although should be possible to work 2 days only from the office, most probably that would be the most flexible we could be in that case. 

Also, it is important I mention that during training (first 3 weeks) it will be required to come to the office more often, maybe even 100%. That we certainly cannot adjust because training is done on site by the external trainer from the platform. 

I understand that schedule might not be comfortable to all, nevertheless I cannot at this point promise more work from home. Please reconsider the offer, and let me know if you are willing to move forward.

Regards,
Malgorzata

Dear Malgorzata,

Thank you for your prompt response. I completely understand that the decision regarding the hybrid model schedule is made by the client and management. I appreciate your clarification that working 2 days from the office would likely be the most flexible arrangement possible.

I also understand and acknowledge that during the initial training period, it may be necessary to be present in the office for the majority, if not all, of the time. I recognize the importance of on-site training facilitated by the external trainer from the platform.

While I understand that this schedule may not be ideal for everyone, I am still very interested in moving forward with the process. I believe that this opportunity aligns well with my skills and career goals, and I am eager to contribute to the team's success.

Please rest assured that I have taken into account the information you provided regarding the hybrid model and training requirements. I am willing to reconsider the offer and would like to proceed with the next steps in the hiring process.

Thank you once again for your understanding and clear communication. I look forward to hearing from you soon.

Best regards,
Cristina

translate this job description in english: Neoelectra, compañía dedicada a operar activos de cogeneración y biomasa, requiere incorporar en nuestras oficinas centrales de Sant Just Desvern un/a Técnico Analista de Mercado Junior.
Asumiendo dicho puesto, y en dependencia directa del Responsable de Mercado, el/la candidato/a participará en:


· El control del portfolio de energía, desde el corto plazo hasta el medio-largo plazo, que incluye generación y comercialización.
· La operación en los mercados físicos de la cartera de energía incluyendo ofertas y nominaciones en los diferentes mercados.
· Análisis, estudio y seguimiento de los principales indicadores del mercado energético y materias primas.
· Análisis de las diferentes opciones de participación en los mercados físicos y financieros.
· Centralización de los aspectos contractuales con las partes implicadas.


Requisitos mínimos:
-Estar cursando, o haber finalizado recientemente, estudios superiores, muy valorable en Ingeniería Superior.
-Estar interesado/a en comenzar una carrera dentro del sector energético.
-Buscamos una persona altamente resolutiva, dinámica, organizada y disciplinada.
-Valorable un nivel alto de inglés.

Neoelectra, a company dedicated to operating cogeneration and biomass assets, is looking to incorporate a Junior Market Analyst Technician at our headquarters in Sant Just Desvern.

In this position, reporting directly to the Market Manager, the candidate will be involved in:

- Monitoring the energy portfolio, from short-term to medium-long term, including generation and commercialization.
- Operating in the physical markets of the energy portfolio, including bids and nominations in different markets.
- Analyzing, studying, and monitoring key indicators of the energy market and raw materials.
- Analyzing different options for participating in physical and financial markets.
- Centralizing contractual aspects with involved parties.

Minimum requirements:
- Currently pursuing or recently completed higher education studies, preferably in Engineering.
- Interest in starting a career in the energy sector.
- We are looking for someone highly resourceful, dynamic, organized, and disciplined.
- A high level of English is desirable.

translate this one : Somos creadores de ideas.

Ayudamos a nuestros clientes a ser líderes.

Trabajamos con nuestros clientes como socios estratégicos: las mejores ideas surgen de la colaboración.

Nos centramos en lo que hacen las marcas, más que en lo que dicen.

Nadie es especialista en todo, pero sí podemos abarcar todo el espectro necesario para crear fenómenos y plataformas de comunicación.

Nos sumergimos en el negocio de nuestros clientes y buscamos soluciones creativas. Creamos ideas con trascendencia social porque sólo así tendremos relevancia.

Nombrada Agencia del Año en múltiples ocasiones y una de las más premiadas en festivales nacionales e internacionales. Pero sobre todo somos una agencia que conecta y mantiene vivo el diálogo de las marcas con las personas a través de las ideas.

¿Te unes?

 Perfil 

Estamos buscando a un/a Marketing Cloud Developer, para trabajar para una importante marca en un equipo multidisciplinar de más de 40 personas.

Qualifications

 Requisitos: 


 Certificación de Salesforce Marketing Cloud developer 
 De 3-4 años de experiencia. 
 Capacidad de trabajo en equipo y flexibilidad ante los cambios. 


Responsibilities

Este perfil será responsable del desarrollo y automatización de campañas cross channel en Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

Responsabilidades:


 Creación de journeys y automatización de campañas con Journey builder. 
 Dinamización de contenidos utilizado lenguajes AMPSCRIPT y SSJS. 
 Conocimiento para crear targets groups con Audience Builder. 
 Implementación de creatividades con Content Builder. 
 Capacidad analítica de CRM y extracción de datos en Salesforce.

We are creators of ideas.

We help our clients become leaders.

We work with our clients as strategic partners: the best ideas come from collaboration.

We focus on what brands do, rather than what they say.

No one is an expert in everything, but we can cover the entire spectrum necessary to create communication phenomena and platforms.

We immerse ourselves in our clients' business and seek creative solutions. We create socially impactful ideas because that's how we stay relevant.

Named Agency of the Year on multiple occasions and one of the most award-winning agencies in national and international festivals. But above all, we are an agency that connects and keeps the dialogue between brands and people alive through ideas.

Are you in?

Profile

We are looking for a Marketing Cloud Developer to work for a major brand in a multidisciplinary team of over 40 people.

Qualifications

Requirements:

Salesforce Marketing Cloud Developer certification 
3-4 years of experience
Ability to work in a team and adapt to changes.

Responsibilities

This profile will be responsible for the development and automation of cross-channel campaigns in Salesforce Marketing Cloud.

Responsibilities:

Creation of journeys and automation of campaigns using Journey Builder.
Content dynamization using AMPSCRIPT and SSJS languages.
Knowledge of creating target groups with Audience Builder.
Implementation of creatives using Content Builder.
Analytical ability in CRM and data extraction in Salesforce.
make this intro formy cv more generics not related to teleperformance

Dear Hiring Manager,

I am writing to express my interest in the [Job Position] at your esteemed organization. With a strong passion for [relevant industry], I am excited about the opportunity to contribute my skills and expertise in this role. 

I have a proven track record of [mention key achievements or experiences relevant to the position], and I am confident in my ability to make a significant impact on your team and contribute to the overall success of the organization. 

Throughout my career, I have developed a solid foundation in [relevant skills or areas of expertise], and I am continuously striving to stay updated with the latest industry trends and advancements. 

I am a dedicated and results-oriented professional, with a strong ability to [mention key skills or qualities relevant to the position]. My exceptional attention to detail, excellent communication skills, and ability to work well in both individual and team settings make me a valuable asset to any organization. 

Thank you for considering my application. I am confident that my qualifications and passion for [industry] make me an ideal fit for the [Job Position]. I look forward to the opportunity to further discuss how my skills and experience align with your organization's goals and objectives.

Sincerely,
[Your Name]
